data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: The simpler the interface, the quicker users can navigate and find information.
data.technical_spec: Minimalist design; Quick links; Streamlined navigation

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimized for efficient user interaction with commonly used controls positioned in easy-to-reach areas.
data.technical_spec: Ergonomic design; Proximity-based arrangement; Responsive buttons

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Google’s clean design aesthetics make users perceive the website as more user-friendly and functional.
data.technical_spec: Visual hierarchy; Consistent branding; Clean interface

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Aligned with users' existing mental models for site functionality from past experiences with Google search.
data.technical_spec: Predictable interface; Familiar functionality; Established patterns

data.title: The Principle of Least Effort
data.description: Design focuses on providing search results with minimal effort from the user.
data.technical_spec: Search algorithms; Auto-complete features; Intuitive search bar
